question:
```helixschema
N::Sensor {
    device_id: String,
    value: F64,
    unit: String,
    timestamp: Date,
}
```

Нужен эндпоинт `GetAllSensorHoldoutA` — получить все записи.
expected_answer:
QUERY GetAllSensorHoldoutA () =>
    items <- N<Sensor>
    RETURN items

question:
```helixschema
N::Post {
    title: String,
    body: String,
    author: String,
    published: Boolean,
}
```

Нужен эндпоинт `AddPostHoldoutA` — создать новую запись со всеми полями.
expected_answer:
QUERY AddPostHoldoutA (title: String, body: String, author: String, published: Boolean) =>
    item <- AddN<Post>({  
        title: title,
        body: body,
        author: author,
        published: published,
    })
    RETURN item

question:
```helixschema

    title: String,
    body: String,
    author: String,
    lang: String,
}
```

Нужен эндпоинт `SearchArticle` — векторный поиск по эмбеддингу.
expected_answer:
QUERY SearchArticle (query_vec: [F64], limit: I64) =>
    results <- SearchV<Article>(query_vec, limit)
    RETURN results

question:
```helixschema
V::Chunk {
    text: String,
    source: String,
    page: I64,
    score: F64,
}
```

Нужен эндпоинт `SearchChunkMMR` — векторный поиск с mmr-диверсификацией.
expected_answer:
QUERY SearchChunkMMR (query_vec: [F64], limit: I64) =>
    results <- SearchV<Chunk>(query_vec, limit)
        ::RerankMMR(lambda: 0.7)
    RETURN results

question:
```helixschema
N::User {
    name: String,
    country: String,
    city: String,
    age: U8
}
```

Нужен эндпоинт `CountUsersByCountry` — подсчитать пользователей по странам через count + group_by.
expected_answer:
QUERY CountUsersByCountry () =>
    users <- N<User>
    RETURN users::GROUP_BY(country)

QUERY FindOptimalPath(start_id: ID, end_id: ID) =>
    result <- N<Server>(start_id)
        ::ShortestPathDijkstras<Connection>(
            ADD(
                MUL(_::{latency}, 0.4),
                ADD(
                    MUL(DIV(1, _::{bandwidth}), 0.3),
                    MUL(
                        SUB(1, _::{reliability}),
                        0.3
                    )
                )
            )
        )
        ::To(end_id)
    RETURN result

question:
```helixschema
V::Article {
    title: String,
    body: String,
    author: String,
    lang: String,
}
```

Нужен эндпоинт `SearchArticleByTitle` — векторный поиск с постфильтрацией.
expected_answer:
QUERY SearchArticleByTitle (query_vec: [F64], limit: I64, title: String) =>
    results <- SearchV<Article>(query_vec, limit)
        ::WHERE(_::{title}::EQ(title))
    RETURN results

```helixschema
    price: F64,
    category: String,
    stock: I64,
}
```

Нужен эндпоинт `GetProductWherePriceGTHoldoutA` — фильтрация по диапазону значений.
expected_answer:
QUERY GetProductWherePriceGTHoldoutA (min_val: F64) =>
    items <- N<Product>::WHERE(_::{price}::GT(min_val))
    RETURN items

question:
```helixschema
V::Chunk {
    text: String,
    source: String,
    page: I64,
    score: F64,
}
```

Нужен эндпоинт `GetChunkByPage` — фильтрация по значению поля.
expected_answer:
QUERY GetChunkByPage (page: I64) =>
    items <- V<Chunk>::WHERE(_::{page}::EQ(page))
    RETURN items

QUERY InsertVector (user_id: ID, vector: [F64], content: String, created_at: Date) =>
    vector_node <- AddV<Document>(vector, { content: content, created_at: created_at })
    edge <- AddE<User_to_Document_Embedding>::From(user_id)::To(vector_node)
    RETURN "Success"

question:
```helixschema
N::Item {
    item_id: String,
    position: I64
}
```

Нужен эндпоинт `CategorizeByRotation` — using mod for cyclic patterns.
expected_answer:
QUERY CategorizeByRotation(group_size: I64) =>
    items <- N<Item>
        ::{
            item_id,
            position,
            group: MOD(_::{position}, group_size),
            is_first_in_group: MOD(_::{position}, group_size)::EQ(0)
        }
    RETURN items

question:
```helixschema
N::Product {
    name: String,
    price: F64,
    category: String,
    stock: I64,
}
```

Нужен эндпоинт `DeleteProduct` — удалить запись по id.
expected_answer:
QUERY DeleteProduct (product_id: ID) =>
    DROP N<Product>(product_id)
    RETURN "ok"

```helixschema
    title: String,
    year: I64,
    genre: String,
    rating: F64,
}
```

Нужен эндпоинт `GetFilmYearByTitleHoldoutA` — фильтрация с выборкой конкретных полей.

expected_answer:
QUERY GetProfileFollowsUsernamesHoldoutA (profile_id: ID) =>
    node <- N<Profile>(profile_id)
    neighbors <- node::Out<Follows>
    RETURN neighbors::{username}

QUERY RecoverAngles() =>
    measurements <- N<Measurement>
        ::{
            ratio,
            angle_from_sin: ASIN(_::{ratio}),
            angle_from_cos: ACOS(_::{ratio}),
            angle_from_tan: ATAN(_::{ratio})
        }
    RETURN measurements
